shadcn-html / select

Made from: CSS

Select

A native dropdown for choosing from a list of options. Built on <select> with appearance: none and a custom chevron.

Component Specification — components/select/select.md

Native basis

<select> element with custom styling via appearance: none.

Web Platform APIs

<select> <optgroup>

Accessibility

• Native <select> provides full keyboard navigation (arrow keys, type-ahead).

• Use <label> with for for description.

• Use disabled on <option> elements for placeholder text.

Default

Native select with placeholder.

<select class="select">
  <option value="" disabled selected>Select a fruit</option>
  <option value="apple">Apple</option>
  ...
</select>

With groups

<select class="select">
  <optgroup label="Americas">
    <option>New York</option>
    ...
  </optgroup>
</select>

Disabled

<select class="select" disabled>...</select>

Full specification → components/select/select.md
